mapper.sql: id, employee_id, name, role, start_date, end_date, status
mapper.select: SELECT FROM projects ORDER BY name
SELECT FROM projects WHERE LOWER(name) = LOWER(#{name}) ORDER BY employee_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO projects (id, employee_id, name, role, start_date, end_date, status) VALUES (#{id}, #{employeeId}, #{name}, #{role}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE projects SET employee_id = #{employeeId}, name = #{name}, role = #{role}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM projects WHERE LOWER(name) = LOWER(#{name})
mapper.update: UPDATE projects SET name = #{newName} WHERE LOWER(name) = LOWER(#{oldName})
UPDATE projects SET status = #{status} WHERE LOWER(name) = LOWER(#{name})
